description: Perform an internal link audit for the product page 'A Light in the Attic' (https://books.toscrape.com/catalogue/a-light-in-the-attic_1000/index.html) by crawling https://books.toscrape.com/ with Screaming Frog SEO Spider. Export the list of inlinks pointing to this specific page, including 'From', 'To', and 'Anchor Text' columns, to ~/Documents/SEO/exports/attic_inlinks.csv.
